base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dr_wily_phases — a character (boss) from 1988 mega man 2. Dr. Wily Machine 2 — multi-phase fight (2-stage mech) + Wily Alien final-form (hologram trick, revealed as hologram by Bubble Lead). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dr. Wily Machine 2 — multi-phase fight (2-stage mech) + Wily Alien final-form (hologram trick, revealed as hologram by Bubble Lead)
